title: tabebuia sauvallei
intro: Tabebuia sauvallei, also known as the Lapacho tree, is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Tabebuia sauvallei include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, and it has been traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be made from the bark, leaves, or roots of the tree.
